changes.summary: Simplified nav event listeners and player asset loading for cleaner, more reliable behavior across the app.
"Manage keepers" link on the AFL Fantasy homepage now goes to the Keeper Planner on afl-fantasy.com instead of a broken internal page.
Removed the stray gap above the AFL Fantasy homepage — the hero and Schefter Report now sit flush at the top of their columns instead of floating below an empty band.
Preseason homepage hero promos (tag window, team purchase deadline, release deadline) now use a darker, readable blue so the white pill label and countdown stand out instead of washing out.
AFL Fantasy's Owner Activity report now tracks waiver claims instead of auction wins — AFL is a keeper league with no auction, so the old "Auctions" column never reflected real activity.
